  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Bike Logistics Officer",
  "description": "Eromedix Technologies is a company incorporated in 1996 to provide quality support to healthcare facilities through the supplies of Medical Diagnostic Equipment, consumables, maintenance services, training, delivery services, leadership and healthcare development. We have our head office in Rivers state, Imo state and Akwa Ibom state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bike Logistics Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are&nbsp;seeking a result-oriented and proactive Business Development Executive to join our Owerri team.


Key Responsibilities:


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong client relationships
	Develop and implement sales strategies
	Promote and market Eromedix products and services
	Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities
	Meet and exceed sales targets


Other Responsibilities:
Sample Collection &amp; Delivery


	Pick up laboratory samples from hospitals, clinics, and partner facilities.
	Deliver samples to the diagnostic centre laboratory promptly for testing.
	Transport samples carefully to prevent damage, contamination, or delay.


Delivery of Reports:


	Deliver test results and medical reports to hospitals, doctors, and patients when required.
	Ensure confidentiality and security of patient medical information.


Transportation of Medical Supplies


	Transport laboratory consumables, reagents, and medical supplies between branches or partner facilities.
	Ensure proper handling of fragile or temperature-sensitive items.


Logistics Coordination


	Follow daily delivery schedules and assigned routes.
	Communicate with the laboratory, front desk, and logistics officer regarding pickups and deliveries.
	Confirm receipt of items with signatures or documentation.


Documentation:


	Maintain delivery logs and records for all pickups and drop-offs.
	Ensure all waybills, dispatch forms, and delivery notes are properly signed and returned.


Safety &amp; Compliance:


	Ensure proper packaging and safe handling of biological samples.
	Follow infection prevention and control guidelines.
	Use protective equipment where necessary.


Bike Maintenance:


	Keep the motorcycle clean, fueled, and in good working condition.
	Report maintenance issues immediately.
	Ensure valid license, insurance, and vehicle documents are always available.


Requirements


	BSc / HND in Marketing, Business Admin, or related field
	1&ndash;2 years of experience in sales, marketing, or business development
	Excellent communication and negotiation skills
	Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
	Must be based in or willing to relocate to Owerri
	Tech-savvy and familiar with medical/technology products.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application Letter to:&nbsp;eromedixconcepts@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Bike Logistics Officer Job at Eromedix Technologies




        
    

        
        Eromedix Technologies is a company incorporated in 1996 to provide quality support to healthcare facilities through the supplies of Medical Diagnostic Equipment, consumables, maintenance services, training, delivery services, leadership and healthcare development. We have our head office in Rivers state, Imo state and Akwa Ibom state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bike Logistics Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a result-oriented and proactive Business Development Executive to join our Owerri team.


Key Responsibilities:


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong client relationships
	Develop and implement sales strategies
	Promote and market Eromedix products and services
	Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities
	Meet and exceed sales targets


Other Responsibilities:
Sample Collection & Delivery


	Pick up laboratory samples from hospitals, clinics, and partner facilities.
	Deliver samples to the diagnostic centre laboratory promptly for testing.
	Transport samples carefully to prevent damage, contamination, or delay.


Delivery of Reports:


	Deliver test results and medical reports to hospitals, doctors, and patients when required.
	Ensure confidentiality and security of patient medical information.


Transportation of Medical Supplies


	Transport laboratory consumables, reagents, and medical supplies between branches or partner facilities.
	Ensure proper handling of fragile or temperature-sensitive items.


Logistics Coordination


	Follow daily delivery schedules and assigned routes.
	Communicate with the laboratory, front desk, and logistics officer regarding pickups and deliveries.
	Confirm receipt of items with signatures or documentation.


Documentation:


	Maintain delivery logs and records for all pickups and drop-offs.
	Ensure all waybills, dispatch forms, and delivery notes are properly signed and returned.


Safety & Compliance:


	Ensure proper packaging and safe handling of biological samples.
	Follow infection prevention and control guidelines.
	Use protective equipment where necessary.


Bike Maintenance:


	Keep the motorcycle clean, fueled, and in good working condition.
	Report maintenance issues immediately.
	Ensure valid license, insurance, and vehicle documents are always available.


Requirements


	BSc / HND in Marketing, Business Admin, or related field
	1–2 years of experience in sales, marketing, or business development
	Excellent communication and negotiation skills
	Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
	Must be based in or willing to relocate to Owerri
	Tech-savvy and familiar with medical/technology products.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, message: +2349070383220 via WhatsApp.

Human Resources Generalist Job at CourierPlus




        
    

        
        CourierPlus is a leading logistics and distribution services company established in 2009. We offer a wide array of express courier and logistic support solutions to our various customers.

Job Position: Human Resources Generalist

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Role Overview

	We are seeking a proactive and results-oriented HR Generalist to support the full spectrum of human resource functions within a fast-paced logistics environment.
	The successful candidate will play a key role in recruitment, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and HR operations across multiple business units including fleet, warehouse, and administrative teams.
	This role requires strong operational HR capability and the ability to work effectively in a structured, performance-driven organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Coordinate employee documentation, records management, and HRIS updates.
	Support performance management processes including appraisals and KPI tracking.
	Handle employee relations matters and provide guidance on disciplinary procedures.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies.
	Support payroll coordination, leave administration, and benefits management.
	Assist in implementing training and development initiatives.
	Monitor attendance, absenteeism, and workforce metrics.
	Support HR reporting including turnover, headcount, and attrition analysis.
	Participate in HR projects and continuous improvement initiatives.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	3–5 years of experience in a generalist HR role.
	Experience within logistics, transportation, or operations-driven industries is an advantage.
	Strong knowledge of labor laws and HR best practices.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR systems.
	Membership of CIPM or relevant professional body is an added advantage.


Key Competencies:


	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.
	Strong organizational and multitasking ability.
	Data-driven mindset and attention to detail.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced operational environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cv to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Credit Risk Officer Job at Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial service to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016. Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited’s financial inclusion effort focuses on promoting savings culture, access to credit facilities for income-generation purposes and reducing vulnerability to risk through micro insurance.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



The Bank’s major strategic focus employs the group lending methodology in its operations with a leaning towards women. It believes in the commitment of women folk to work hard and help their families conquer poverty. As such, more than 95% of the Bank’s lending activities focuses on women. The success of the bank’s group lending activities largely depends on group solidarity and cohesion. The success recorded by the bank in its lending program has earned it strategic partnership with the Bank of Industry (BOI) and the Development Bank of Nigeria (DBN) among others. The combination of cutting-edge technology, a strong and committed Board of Directors and motivated employees has helped the Bank to create a brand widely accepted by its teeming clients in Lagos. It is now expanding its frontiers in a scaling program aimed at delivering improved value to its stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Credit Risk Officer
Job Location: Ekiti
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Preparations of loans to be disburse on Daily basis.
	Loan Appraisal/Loan Analysis.
	Pre-chat with customers.
	Preparation of confirmation list/credit search list of approved loan forms.
	Bosak Asset Finance Loan Processing, Booking and Disbursement.
	Recording of Loans disbursed manually and in BTL excel sheet.
	Recording of all customers disbursed to in Membership list.
	Recording of BAFL disbursed manually.
	Generation of active running loans report for BAFL
	Generation of BTL and BATSL Expected report for Delinquency Management Officer.
	Processing the release of BAFL Receipts.
	Secretary for Area Committee Meeting (for loans above 100,000.00 naira).
	Secretary for Delinquency meeting
	Generation of report for loans booked as at the end of every week (Fridays).
	Generation of report for ALCO (Mondays).
	Field disbursement for Mowe and Iganmu Business Units.
	Booking and disbursing of Loans.


Remuneration and Benefits


	Salary: N100,000– N120,000 monthly
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave & Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Credit Risk Officer Ekiti” as the subject of the email.
